@sample @demo @reference: DL-13 baseline governance policy (I-17B mobile UI verification).
//policy-source: DL-13 §Baseline storage, approval, update, normalization, and stale-baseline policy.

forbidden_auto_accept.rule: CI and normal verification must NOT auto-update, auto-accept, or silently regenerate baselines (DL-13).
forbidden_auto_accept.validator_check: any governance/runner path with auto_accept=true, auto_regenerate=true, or silent_update=true is a hard failure (W-NEG-SILENT-BASELINE).

stale_baseline_policy.missing_baseline: hard failure (unless the row is explicitly in first-baseline-proposal state)
stale_baseline_policy.stale_identity: hard failure (identity fields changed without an approved update proposal)

normalization_policy.validator_check: normalization rules that include any forbidden/semantic mask are a hard failure.

baseline_storage_location: implementation-lane-owned fixture/baseline paths (under e2e-ui/mobile/baselines/ here), linked by evidence packets — never under DL-13 paths.
//live-status-note: No baseline PNGs are committed in this env (no live device capture). The governance + proposal STRUCTURE is the deterministic deliverable; baseline PNGs arrive with the pending-live device run.
